data.title: Lululemon launches ecommerce site in Mexico
data.description: In March, Lululemon reported 9% year-over-year growth in its digital sales for its fiscal Q4 2025. Digital sales totaled $1.9 billion, comprising more than half of Lululemon’s total quarterly revenue.

data.title: QXO announces $17 billion acquisition of TopBuild
data.description: The boards of directors at both TopBuild and QXO unanimously approved the acquisition, which is subject to customary closing conditions.

data.title: David's Bridal adds two AI platforms as shopping channels
data.description: Shoppers can now browse and buy wedding gowns, bridesmaids’ dresses and other special-occasion attire via Microsoft Copilot and OpenAI’s ChatGPT.

data.title: UK grocer Tesco goes all in on AI with Adobe
data.description: The companies will embed Adobe engineers directly alongside Tesco's in-house technology teams to accelerate experimentation in AI-driven personalization and on-brand content production at scale.

data.title: Walmart launches new portal for facility services
data.description: The retailer said it built Upstream Facility Services to address both routine preventative maintenance — including inspections and tune-ups — and urgent repairs to essential systems like plumbing and electrical systems.
